rules.name: run-checks-before-pr
rules.evidence: run the following commands in that library's directory before creating a pull request

rules.name: no-sphinx-double-backtick
rules.evidence: Do NOT use Sphinx-style double backtick formatting (``code``). Use single backticks (`code`) for inline code references in docstrings and comments.

uncompilable: TEST environment variable syntax for running a specific test file — usage documentation, no obligation/prohibition attached
Libraries overview list (checkpoint, cli, langgraph, etc.) — descriptive catalog, not an actionable rule
Dependency map showing which libraries impact which — informational awareness note, no obligation attached to any action
